\tzpentry{ID3542}{Quantum Quantum State Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3542 introduces Quantum Quantum State Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Psi(t)=e^{-i\hat H t/\hbar}\Psi_{\rm in}. \]
